name: Chocolate Chip Blonde Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add nuts; mix well and set aside.
3. Melt butter in a saucepan and remove from heat. (If margarine is used, add 1 tablespoon hot water.)
4. Add brown sugar and beat well. Let cool.
5. Add egg and vanilla and blend.
6. Add flour mixture, a small amount at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Spread in greased 8 x 8 inch pan. Sprinkle chocolate chips over top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes. Do not overbake.
9. Cool in pan and cut into squares.
If doubling the recipe, bake in a 9 x 12 inch pan.
